title: Multiple Actual Board View
excerpt: I am trying to find a way to view multiple boards at one time, perhaps on dashboard - not certain items on the board only or something that categorizes by status or person (kanbanify widget) or connecting boards.  I want…

posts.author: LSV (Lauren)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to find a way to view multiple boards at one time, perhaps on dashboard - not certain items on the board only or something that categorizes by status or person (kanbanify widget) or connecting boards. I want to view actual full boards all in one master overview board, be able to scroll up and down the board and use them. I want to go back and forth from the boards by being on this one master overview board as we have so many, Does this exist?
